Basic gh_page using jekyll_theme_hacker

View on GitHub

Github pages using jekyll

Bar chart race: CO2 emissions

random/test stuff esp. infosec related

I like a jekyll base and vanillajs for anything which cannot otherwise be achieved because:

  1. 99% content never changes from one minute to another (fast jekyll rebuilds can be done)
  2. static sites are very secure and very fast
  3. beautiful themes, consistent UI, rapid development, low code base
  4. like markdown and templates in general jade/jinja
  5. more time for cool stuff, seriously, c’mon why not?

hollerith GitHub.io
